videoSnippet.title: The Final Form || Jan-Krzysztof Duda vs Magnus Carlsen || Chess.com Open 2026 GRAND FINAL
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Carlsen, Magnus (2902) - Duda, Jan-Krzysztof (2872) 
2026 Chess.com Open (Chess.com) [06-01] 2026.04.26
A35 English, symmetrical, four knights system

1.Nf3 Nf6 2.c4 c5 3.Nc3 Nc6 4.e3 e6 5.d4 d5 6.a3 dxc4 7.Bxc4 a6 8.Bd3 cxd4 9.exd4 Be7 10.O-O b5 11.Bg5 Bb7 12.Re1 O-O 13.Bc2 b4 14.Qd3 g6 15.Na4 bxa3 16.bxa3 Nd5 17.Bh6 Re8 18.Nc5 Qc7 19.Rac1 Rac8 20.Ba4 Red8 21.h4 Nb6 22.Bb3 Nd5 23.h5 Bxc5 24.Rxc5 Qd6 25.Bxd5 exd5 26.Qe3 f6 27.Rb1 Ba8 28.Rb6 Rb8 29.Bf4
